name: LinkedIn company search, AI scoring, and Sheets CRM
description: Searches for companies using Exa, scrapes their websites with Firecrawl, uses Claude AI to score and qualify them, and adds the results to a Google Sheets CRM. Adapted from n8n's LinkedIn company search and scoring workflow.

source.originalName: Search LinkedIn companies, score with AI and add them to Google Sheet CRM

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for company search

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for website scraping

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for CRM output

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for scoring results

searchQuery.description: Company search query (e.g. 'AI startups in fintech')

scoringCriteria.default: B2B SaaS companies with product-market fit, 10-500 employees, funded

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for the CRM

steps.name: Build search query for company discovery
Compile all company data for AI scoring
Save scored companies to Google Sheets CRM
